title: Conjunctions and Linkers
intro: Linkers and conjunctions connect ideas within and between sentences. Using them correctly improves **cohesion** (clear connections) and **coherence** (logical flow) in writing and speaking.

logical_categories.meaning: Add information or another point; show that two ideas go together.
logical_categories.linkers: and, also, as well as, moreover, furthermore, in addition, in addition to, not only … but also, besides, what is more

logical_categories.meaning: Show a difference, opposition, or unexpected turn between ideas.
logical_categories.linkers: but, however, although, though, even though, whereas, while, nevertheless, on the other hand, in contrast, despite, in spite of, yet, still

logical_categories.meaning: Explain why something happens or why you hold a view.
logical_categories.linkers: because, since, as, due to, owing to, because of, for this reason, the reason why

logical_categories.meaning: Show the result of something, or the aim or intention behind an action.
logical_categories.linkers: so, therefore, thus, as a result, consequently, so that, in order to, so as to, for this reason

essay_linkers.use: Introduce the concluding paragraph; sum up the argument.

essay_linkers.phrase: In my opinion / I believe that / I think that
Firstly, Secondly, Thirdly / First, Second, Finally
essay_linkers.use: Order your main points or arguments.
Add another supporting point in an essay.

essay_linkers.phrase: On the one hand … on the other hand
essay_linkers.use: Present two contrasting sides of an argument.

essay_linkers.phrase: For example / For instance / Such as
essay_linkers.use: Introduce examples to support a point.
Show the result or conclusion of an argument.

essay_linkers.phrase: To sum up / In summary / In short
essay_linkers.use: Summarise the main points before a conclusion.

essay_linkers.phrase: It is often said that / Many people believe that
essay_linkers.use: Introduce a general or common view (e.g. in discussion essays).

essay_linkers.phrase: From my point of view / From my perspective
essay_linkers.use: State your viewpoint in a formal way.
Make a broad statement before giving details.

essay_linkers.phrase: In other words / That is to say
As far as … is concerned / When it comes to
essay_linkers.use: Focus on a particular topic or aspect.

essay_linkers.phrase: On the whole / All in all
essay_linkers.use: Give an overall assessment or conclusion.
